ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is located */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the organization's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization managing the unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., DCRN) */,
  "unit_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the unit (e.g., Mobile) */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the unit is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the unit */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the unit is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the unit is located */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the unit's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the unit is located */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the unit's location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the unit's location */,
  "unit_status" TEXT /* Status of the unit (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "unit_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the unit (e.g., available, deployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_unit_type FOREIGN KEY ("unit_type") REFERENCES unit_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_unit_subtype FOREIGN KEY ("unit_subtype") REFERENCES unit_subtypes ("subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the location (e.g., L1, L2, L3) */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent location (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit subtype */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the log entry pertains to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "log_action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., deployed, returned, maintenance) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the unit's location at the time of the log */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the unit's location at the time of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_logs_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., responder, manager, admin) */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the log entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES unit_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "incident_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., ongoing, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_units" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit responding to the incident */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the unit's response */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time of the unit's response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_logs" (
  "incident_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident log entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the log entry pertains to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "log_action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., response, update, resolution) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_equipment" (
  "unit_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit equipment entry */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the equipment is assigned to */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., communication, medical, rescue) */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_equipment_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_personnel" (
  "unit_personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit personnel entry */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the personnel is assigned to */,
  "personnel_name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel */,
  "personnel_role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel (e.g., team leader, technician) */,
  "personnel_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the personnel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_personnel_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)
